# TasteUI

TasteUI is a platform for sharing and discovering drop-in design skills for AI coding agents. Upload your custom shadcn/ui components, share design systems, and let others use your designs with a single CLI command.

## What You Can Do

- **Upload Designs**: Share your custom shadcn/ui components with the community
- **Discover Skills**: Browse design patterns, color systems, and component variations  
- **One-Command Install**: Copy any design to your project with `npx tasteui add <design-id>`
- **Build Your Profile**: Showcase your design work and build a following

## Core Pages

- Homepage: https://tasteui.dev - Browse trending designs and featured skills
- User Profiles: https://tasteui.dev/u/{username} - View designer portfolios
- Design Details: https://tasteui.dev/s/{username}/{design-slug} - Individual design pages
- Documentation: https://tasteui.dev/docs - Getting started guides
- Bookmarks: https://tasteui.dev/bookmarks - Saved designs (requires login)

## Key Features

- Automatic component extraction and preview generation
- Design token and CSS variable preservation
- CLI tool for seamless integration with existing projects
- R2-backed storage for high-performance image delivery
- GitHub OAuth authentication

## Technology Stack

- Frontend: TanStack Start (React + Vite + TanStack Router)
- Backend: Hono on Cloudflare Workers
- Database: PostgreSQL with Drizzle ORM
- Storage: Cloudflare R2
- UI: shadcn/ui components with Tailwind CSS

## Contact

- Website: https://tasteui.dev
- GitHub: https://github.com/tasteui
- Twitter: @tasteui
- Email: hello@tasteui.dev
